rust-unofficial/awesome-rust

A curated list of Rust code and resources.
View byDAY/WEEK/README
View on Github

Awesome Rust

A curated list of Rust code and resources.

If you want to contribute, please read this.

Applications

See also Rust — Production organizations running Rust in production.

  • alacrittystars32k — A cross-platform, GPU enhanced terminal emulator
  • AnderEnder/s3find-rsstars27 — A command line utility to walk an Amazon S3 hierarchy, an analog of find for Amazon S3
  • andschwa/rust-genetic-algorithmstars68 — A genetic algorithm for academic benchmark problems
  • asm-cli-ruststars138 — An interactive assembly shell written in rust.
  • ballistastars2.2k — PoC of distributed compute platform using Rust, Apache Arrow, and Kubernetes!
  • cloudflare/boringtunstars3.2k — A Userspace WireGuard VPN Implementation
  • darrint/device-blockerstars29 — Limit screen time to children's various mobile devices by blocking internet access on the family Wifi router.
  • denoland/denostars75.3k — A secure JavaScript/TypeScript runtime built with V8, Rust, and Tokio
  • dlecan/generic-dns-updatestars10 — A tool to update DNS zonefiles with your IP address
  • Factotumstars161 — A system to programmatically run data pipelines
  • fcsonline/drillstars803 — A HTTP load testing application inspired by Ansible syntax
  • Fractalidestars683 — Simple Rust Microservices
  • habitat — An tool created by Chef to build, deploy, and manage applications.
  • Herdstars87 — an experimental HTTP load testing application
  • intecture/apistars29 — an API-driven server management and configuration tool
  • ivanceras/diwatastars386 — A database administration tool for postgresql
  • jedisct1/flowggerstars616 — A fast, simple and lightweight data collector
  • kbknapp/doclistars34 — A command line utility for managing DigitalOcean infrastructure
  • kytanstars253 — High Performance Peer-to-Peer VPN
  • limonite — static blog/website generator
  • linkerd/linkerd2-proxystars1.1k — Ultralight service mesh for Kubernetes.
  • MaidSafe — A decentralized platform.
  • mdBook — A command line utility to create books from markdown files
  • nicohman/eidolonstars85 — A steam and drm-free game registry and launcher for linux and macosx
  • nottystars2k — A new kind of terminal
  • Pijul — A patch-based distributed version control system
  • rsign — A simple command-line tool used to generate/sign/verify digital signatures designed to be compatible with Minisign
  • Rudrstars1.6k — A Kubernetes implementation of the Open Application Model specification
  • rxstars1.8k — Vi inspired Modern Pixel Art Editor
  • Sandstorm Collections Appstars23
  • Servostars19.5k — A prototype web browser engine
  • tinystars584 — A terminal IRC client
  • trust-dns — A DNS-server
  • updnsstars43 — DNS proxy tool
  • Weldstars147 — Full fake REST API generator
  • weztermstars1.8k — A GPU-accelerated cross-platform terminal emulator and multiplexer

Audio and Music

  • enginesoundstars89 — A GUI and command line application used to procedurally generate semi-realistic engine sounds. Featuring in-depth configuration, variable sample rate and a frequency analysis window.
  • indiscipline/zrtstrstars18 — A command line utility for checking if stereo wav files are faux-stereo (i.e. have identical channels) and converting such files to mono.
  • Lyriekstars13 — A multi-threaded GTK 3 application for fetching the lyrics of the current playing song.
  • Phate6660/musinfostars10 — A program to query music info from mpd and display it in a notification.
  • Phate6660/rsmpcstars6 — An implementation of mpc, but not directly as there will be a few differences.
  • Phate6660/rsmpcstars0 — A gtk frontend for mpd.
  • Polarisstars676 — A music streaming application.
  • Spotify TUIstars8.4k — A Spotify client for the terminal written in Rust.
  • Spotifydstars5k — An open source Spotify client running as a UNIX daemon.

Cryptocurrencies

  • Bitcoin Satoshi's Visionstars29 — A Rust library for working with Bitcoin SV .
  • cardano-clistars74 — Cardano Command Line Interface (CLI)
  • ChainXstars194 — Fully Decentralized Interchain Crypto Asset Management on Polkadot.
  • CITAstars1.2k — A high performance blockchain kernel for enterprise users.
  • coinbase-pro-rsstars81 — Coinbase pro client in Rust, supports sync/async/websocket
  • ethaddrgenstars86 — Custom Ethereum vanity address generator made in Rust
  • Grinstars4.8k — Evolution of the MimbleWimble protocol
  • hdwalletstars13 — BIP-32 HD wallet related key derivation utilities.
  • Holochainstars326 — Scalable P2P alternative to blockchain for all those distributed apps you always wanted to build. The link to the old repo is thisstars1k which is no longer maintained.
  • ibc-rsstars78 - Rust implementation of the Interblockchain Communication protocol
  • infincia/bip39-rsstars41 — Rust implementation of BIP39.
  • Joystreamstars63 — A user governed video platform
  • Diemstars15.8k — Diem’s mission is to enable a simple global currency and financial infrastructure that empowers billions of people.
  • Lighthousestars1.1k — Rust Ethereum 2.0 Client
  • near/nearcorestars880 — decentralized smart-contract platform for low-end mobile devices.
  • Nervos CKBstars811 — Nervos CKB is a public permissionless blockchain, the common knowledge layer of Nervos network.
  • Nimiqstars68 — Rust implementation of Nimiq node
  • Parity-Bitcoinstars662 — The Parity Bitcoin client
  • Parity-Bridgestars303 — Bridge between any two ethereum-based networks
  • Parity-Ethereumstars800 — Fast, light, and robust Ethereum client
  • Parity-Zcashstars145 — Rust implementation of the Zcash protocol
  • Phala-Network/phala-blockchainstars113 — Confidential smart contract blockchain based on Intel SGX and Substrate
  • Polkadotstars3.3k — Heterogeneous multi‑chain technology with pooled security
  • rbtcstars3 — Convert BTC to any currency and vice-versa.
  • rust-cardanostars244 — Rust implementation of Cardano primitives, helpers, and related applications
  • Substratestars4.5k — Generic modular blockchain template written in Rust
  • tendermint-rsstars173 - Rust implementation of Tendermint blockchain data structures and clients
  • wagyustars367 [wagyu] — Rust library for generating cryptocurrency wallets
  • zcashstars4.4k — Zcash is an implementation of the "Zerocash" protocol.
  • YeeCo yeerootstars25 — YeeCo yeeroot is a permissionless, secure, high performance and scalable public blockchain platform powered by full sharding technology on PoW consensus written in Rust

Database

  • indradb — Rust based graph database
  • Materializestars2.7k - Streaming SQL database powered by Timely Dataflow
  • noria — Dynamically changing, partially-stateful data-flow for web application backends
  • Lucidstars173 — High performance and distributed KV store accessible through a HTTP API.
  • ParityDBstars58 — Fast and reliable database, optimised for read operation
  • PumpkinDBstars1.2k — an event sourcing database engine
  • seppo0010/rsedisstars1.5k — A Redis reimplementation in Rust
  • Skytablestars103 — A multi-model NoSQL database
  • tikvstars9.3k — A distributed KV database in Rust
  • sled — A (beta) modern embedded database
  • TerminusDBstars196 - open source graph database and document store

Emulators

See also crates matching keyword 'emulator'.

  • Commodore 64
    • kondrak/rust64stars175 —
  • Flash Player
    • Rufflestars7.9k — Ruffle is an Adobe Flash Player emulator written in the Rust programming language. Ruffle targets both the desktop and the web using WebAssembly.
  • Gameboy
    • Gekkio/mooneye-gbstars582 —
    • mvdnes/rboystars154 —
    • NivenT/RGBstars15 —
    • mohanson/gameboystars906 — Full featured Cross-platform GameBoy emulator. Forever boys!.
  • Gameboy Advance
    • michelhe/rustboyadvance-ngstars393 - RustboyAdvance-ng is a Gameboy Advance emulator with desktop, android and WebAssembly support.
  • NES
    • iamsix/oxidenesstars35
    • koute/pinkystars628 —
    • pcwalton/sprocketnesstars679
    • Amjad50/plasticstars16 — plastis is a full featured NES emulator built in Rust.
  • Playstation
    • rustation-ng — Playstation emulator using Rust
  • ZX Spectrum
    • pacmancoder/rustzxstars56 —
    • rodrigorc/razestars27 — For WebAssembly, live version here
  • Virtual Boy
    • emu-rs/rustual-boystars216 —
  • Intel 8080 CPU
    • mohanson/i8080stars42 — Intel 8080 cpu emulator by Rust
  • Emulator Development tools
    • SNES
      • ioncodes/snesutilitiesstars4 — ROM analyser/extractor

Games

See also Games Made With Piston.

  • lifthrasiir/angolmois-ruststars88 — A minimalistic music video game which supports the BMS format
  • cityboundstars6.4k — The city sim you deserve
  • schulke-214/connect-fourstars7 — A simple connect four implementation.
  • doukutsu-rsstars213 — A Rust reimplementation of Cave Story engine with some enhancements.
  • rsaarelm/magogstars310 — A roguelike game in Rust
  • schulke-214/rsnakestars46 — Snake written in Rust.
  • soydosstars3 — A wasm implementation of Pusoy Dos
  • cristicbz/rust-doomstars2k — A renderer for Doom, may progress to being a playable game
  • Thinkofname/rust-quakestars42 — Quake map renderer in Rust
  • rhexstars120 — hexagonal ascii roguelike
  • garkimasera/rusted-ruinsstars266 — Extensible open world rogue like game with pixel art
  • Veloren — An open world, open source multiplayer voxel RPG game currently in alpha development
  • swatteau/sokoban-rsstars123 — A Sokoban implementation
  • aleshaleksey/TGWMstars15 — An RPG with turned-based mechanics (work in progress)
  • ozkriff/zemerothstars950 — A small 2D turn-based hexagonal strategy game
  • Zone of Controlstars330 — A turn-based hexagonal strategy game
  • phantomion/snake_gamestars16 - Simple terminal snake game written in Rust.

Graphics

  • Limeth/eucliderstars157 — A real-time 4D CPU ray tracer
  • RazrFalcon/resvgstars1k — An SVG rendering library.
  • ivanceras/svgbobstars2.4k — converts ASCII diagrams into SVG graphics
  • RazrFalcon/svgcleanerstars1.3k — tidies SVG graphics
  • Twinklebear/tray_ruststars432 — A ray tracer
  • turnage/valora — A library for generative fine art
  • Image processing:
    • mikigraf/Image-Processing-CLI-in-Ruststars24 — CLI for processing images, generating histograms.

Industrial automation

  • locka99/opcuastars213 — A pure rust OPC UA library.
  • slowtec/tokio-modbusstars118 — A tokio-based modbus library.
  • BiancoRoyal/modbus-iiot-ruststars9 — A pure rust modbus library with no or less dependencies.

Observability

  • timberio/vectorstars7k — A High-Performance, Logs, Metrics, & Events Router.
  • Mnwa/gtsastars7 — A simple solution to proxy gelf messages (messages for Graylog) to Sentry
  • OpenTelemetry — OpenTelemetry provides a single set of APIs, libraries, agents, and collector services to capture distributed traces and metrics from your application. You can analyze them using Prometheus, Jaeger, and other observability tools.

Operating systems

See also A comparison of operating systems written in Ruststars307.

  • nebulet/nebuletstars2.2k — A microkernel that implements a WebAssembly "usermode" that runs in Ring 0.
  • redox-os/redox —
  • thepowersgang/rust_osstars485 —
  • tock/tockstars2.9k — A secure embedded operating system for Cortex-M based microcontrollers

Productivity

  • espansostars2.9k — A cross-platform Text Expander written in Rust
  • eureka — A CLI tool to input and store your ideas without leaving the terminal
  • pier-cli/pierstars256 — A central repository to manage (add, search metadata, etc.) all your one-liners, scripts, tools, and CLIs
  • subilostars33 - A continuous deployment agent

Security tools

  • kpcyrd/authoscopestars271 — A scriptable network authentication cracker
  • lethestars28 — A secure cross-platform drive wiping utility
  • arvancloud/libinjection-rsstars25 — Rust bindings for libinjectionstars783
  • ripassostars385 — A password manager, filesystem compatible with pass
  • kpcyrd/rshijackstars300 — A TCP connection hijacker, rust rewrite of shijack
  • rustscan/rustscanstars4k — Make Nmap faster with this port scanning tool
  • kpcyrd/sniffgluestars673 — A secure multithreaded packet sniffer
  • kpcyrd/sn0intstars861 — A semi-automatic OSINT framework and package manager
  • phra/rustbusterstars338 — A Comprehensive Web Fuzzer and Content Discovery Tool
  • epi052/feroxbusterstars1.5k - A simple, fast, recursive content discovery tool written in Rust (

System tools

  • ajeetdsouza/zoxidestars2.4k — A fast alternative to cd that learns your habits
  • bandwhichstars6.3k — Terminal bandwidth utilization tool
  • brocode/fblogstars148 — Small command-line JSON Log viewer
  • buster/rrunstars94 — A command launcher for Linux, similar to gmrun
  • cristianoliveira/funzzystars145 — A configurable filesystem watcher inspired by entr
  • dalance/procsstars1.8k — A modern replacement for 'ps' written by Rust
  • diskonautstars911 — Terminal visual disk space navigator
  • duststars2.3k — A more intuitive version of du
  • ddhstars267 — Fast duplicate file finder
  • fselect — Find files with SQL-like queries
  • gituistars4k - Blazing fast terminal client for git written in Rust.
  • k0pernicus/zoustars152 — A download accelerator
  • Kondostars423 - CLI & GUI tool for deleting software project artifacts and reclaiming disk space
  • lotabout/rargsstars296 [rargs] — xargs + awk with pattern matching support
  • lotabout/skimstars2.5k — A fuzzy finder in pure rust
  • mitnk/cicadastars820 — A bash-like Unix shell
  • mmstick/concurrstars78 — Alternative to GNU Parallel w/ a client-server architecture
  • mmstick/fontfinderstars220 — GTK3 application for previewing and installing Google's fonts
  • mmstick/parallelstars1.2k — Reimplementation of GNU Parallel
  • mmstick/tv-renamerstars134 — A tv series renaming application with an optional GTK3 frontend.
  • organize-rt — Organize files based on regex rules (file extensions by default).
  • orhun/kmonstars1.2k — Linux Kernel Manager and Activity Monitor
  • Peltoche/lsdstars5.6k — An ls with a lot of pretty colors and awesome icons
  • ogham/exastars13.2k — A replacement for 'ls'
  • pop-os/debrepstars46 — APT repository tool for building and managing an APT repo
  • pop-os/popsiclestars290 — GTK3 & CLI utility for flashing multiple USB devices in parallel
  • pueuestars1.8k — Manage your long running shell commands.
  • Luminarys/synapsestars729 — Flexible and fast BitTorrent daemon.
  • pop-os/system76-powerstars270 — Linux power management daemon (DBus-interface) with CLI tool.
  • mxseev/logramstars48 — Push log files' updates to Telegram
  • redox-os/ionstars1.1k — Next-generation system shell
  • jamesbirtles/hotkey-rsstars29 — A library to listen to global hotkeys in Rust
  • nivekuil/ripstars295 - A safe and ergonomic alternative to rm
  • sharkdp/batstars26.9k — A cat(1) clone with wings.
  • sharkdp/fdstars17.2k — A simple, fast and user-friendly alternative to find.
  • sitkevij/hexstars271 — A colorized hexdump terminal utility.
  • slai11/gotostars21 — A simple and user-friendly way to jump to your indexed directories.
  • m4b/bingrepstars1.4k — Greps through binaries from various OSs and architectures, and colors them.
  • uutils/coreutilsstars8.4k — A cross-platform Rust rewrite of the GNU coreutils
  • watchexecstars2.3k — Executes commands in response to file modifications
  • XAMPPRocky/tokeistars4.8k — counts the lines of code
  • yake — Yake is a task runner based on yaml files
  • ytopstars2k - A TUI system monitor written in Rust
  • cocomstars6 - NTP client purely written in Rust.

Text editors

  • amp — Inspired by Vi/Vim.
  • gchp/iotastars1.5k — A simple text editor
  • ilai-deutel/kibistars550 — A tiny (≤1024 LOC) text editor with syntax highlighting, incremental search and more.
  • vamolessa/pepperstars30 [pepper] — An opinionated modal editor to simplify code editing from the terminal
  • mathall/rimstars496 — Vim-like text editor written in Rust
  • oxstars2.4k — An independent Rust text editor that runs in your terminal!
  • Remacsstars4.5k — A community-driven port of Emacs to Rust.
  • xi-editorstars18.7k — A modern editor with a backend written in Rust.
  • xraystars8.6k — An experimental next-generation Electron-based text editor.

Text processing

  • cpcstars29 - Parses and calculates strings of math with support for units and unit conversion, from 1+2 to 1% of round(1 lightyear / 14!s to km/h).
  • grexstars3.7k — A command-line tool and library for generating regular expressions from user-provided test cases
  • dmerejkowsky/ruplacerstars210 — Find and replace text in source files
  • ripgrep — combines the usability of The Silver Searcher with the raw speed of grep
  • phiresky/ripgrep-allstars3.7k — ripgrep, but also search in PDFs, E-Books, Office documents, zip, tar.gz, etc.
  • replicadse/complatestars14 — An in-terminal text templating tool designed for standardizing messages (like for GIT commits).
  • sd — Intuitive find & replace CLI
  • lavifb/todo_rstars30 — Find all your TODO notes with one command!
  • whitfin/runiqstars121 — an efficient way to filter duplicate lines from unsorted input.
  • whitfin/bytelinesstars35 — Read input lines as byte slices for high efficiency.
  • vishaltelangre/ffstars258 — Find files (ff) by name!
  • xsv — A fast CSV command line tool (slicing, indexing, selecting, searching, sampling, etc.)
  • Lisprez/so_stupid_searchstars89 — A simple and fast string search tool for human beings

Image processing

  • Imagerstars278 — Automated image optimization.

Utilities

  • aleshaleksey/AZDicestars13 — A dice roll success distribution generator for tabletop homebrewers.
  • yaa110/cbstars48 — Command line interface to manage clipboard
  • brycx/checkpwnstars62 — A Have I Been Pwned (HIBP) command-line utility tool that lets you easily check for compromised accounts and passwords.
  • vamolessa/copycatstars1 [copycat] — A simple clipboard cli interface for windows with text and bmp support
  • evansmurithi/cloakstars119 — A Command Line OTP (One Time Password) Authenticator application.
  • replydev/cotpstars9 - Trustworthy encrypted one time password authenticator app compatible with external backups.
  • arthrp/consoletimerstars16 — Simple timer for your terminal.
  • tversteeg/emplacestars117 — Synchronize installed packages on multiple machines
  • unrelentingtech/freepassstars307 — The free password manager for power users.
  • yoannfleurydev/gitwebstars19 — Open the current remote repository in your browser.
  • mmestars21 — Command line tool to remember you commands that you sometimes forget.
  • raftario/licensorstars119 — write licenses to stdout
  • arthrp/quick-skeletonstars22 — Project scaffolding tool, similar to Yeoman and Slush.
  • repochstars16 — Convert epoch to datetime and datetime to epoch
  • whitfin/s3-concatstars30 — A command line tool to concatenate Amazon S3 files remotely using flexible patterns.
  • whitfin/s3-metastars44 — A command line tool to gather metadata about your Amazon S3 buckets.
  • whitfin/s3-utilsstars34 — A small tool containing utilities based around Amazon S3 to provide additional convenience APIs.
  • gorros/s3-edit-rsstars6 — A command line tool to edit a file directly on Amazon S3.
  • fcsonline/tmux-thumbsstars357 — A lightning fast version of tmux-fingers written in Rust, copy/pasting tmux like vimium/vimperator.
  • amar-laksh/workstationstars15 — A commandline tool to help you manage your workstation by distancing you from your screen, locking your screen when you aren't there among other things with OPENCV!
  • guoxbin/dtoolstars233 — A useful command-line tool collection to assist development including conversion, codec, hashing, encryption, etc.
  • nominostars298 — Batch rename utility for developers
  • barberoussestars18 — AWS Secrets Manager editor
  • vamolessa/vercostars154 [verco] — A simple Git/Hg tui client focused on keyboard shortcuts

Video

  • Phate6660/rsmpvstars2 — A controller for MPV, requires IPC to be enabled in MPV.
  • tgotwig/vidmergerstars12 — A wrapper around ffmpeg which simplifies merging multiple videos 🎞
  • xiph/rav1estars2.5k — The fastest and safest AV1 encoder.
  • yuvadm/slingrstars29 — A simple CLI for streaming media files over a local network to UPnP media renderers
  • yuvadm/streamlibstars23 — Play your favorite live video and audio streams from command line

Virtualization

  • firecracker-microvm/firecrackerstars15.2k — A lightweight virtual machine for container workload Firecracker Microvm
  • oracle/railcarstars1.1k — Docker-like container OCI runtime implementation in Rust
  • tailhook/vaggastars1.7k — A containerization tool without daemons

Web

  • Plume-org/Plumestars1.5k — ActivityPub federating blogging application
  • LemmyNet/lemmystars5k — A link aggregator / reddit clone for the fediverse

Web Servers

  • mufeedvh/binservestars439 — A blazingly fast static web server with routing, templating, and security in a single binary you can set up with zero code
  • thecoshman/httpstars292 — Host These Things Please — A basic http server for hosting a folder fast and simply
  • svenstaro/miniservestars2.4k — A small, self-contained cross-platform CLI tool that allows you to just grab the binary and serve some file(s) via HTTP
  • TheWaWaR/simple-http-serverstars452 — simple static http server
  • wyhaya/seestars133 — Static HTTP file server
  • ronanyeah/rust-hasurastars85 — A demonstration of how a Rust GraphQL server can be used as a remote schema with Hasura

Development tools

  • clippy — Rust lints
  • clog-tool/clog-clistars670 — generates a changelog from git metadata (conventional changelog)
  • dan-t/rusty-tagsstars316 — create ctags/etags for a cargo project and all of its dependencies
  • datanymizer/datanymizerstars222 - Powerful database anonymizer with flexible rules
  • delta — A syntax-highlighter for git and diff output
  • dotenv-linterstars908 — Linter for .env files
  • frewsxcv/crate-depsstars20 — generates images of dependency graphs for crates hosted on crates.io
  • geigerstars798 — A program that list statistics related to usage of unsafe Rust code in a Rust crate and all its dependencies
  • git-journalstars460 — The Git Commit Message and Changelog Generation Framework
  • gstatsstars12 — command line tool to print a developer handy summary of all git repositories below current directory
  • rust-lang/rustfixstars591 — automatically applies the suggestions made by rustc
  • juststars2.8k — A handy command runner for project-specific tasks
  • maskstars517 — A CLI task runner defined by a simple markdown file
  • Module Linkerstars230 — Extension that adds <a> links to references in mod, use and extern crate statements at GitHub.
  • ptagsstars92 — A parallel universal-ctags wrapper for git repository
  • Racerstars3.3k — code completion for Rust
  • rustfmtstars3.6k — A Rust code formatter
  • Rustupstars4k — the Rust toolchain installer
  • Rust Language Serverstars3.3k — A server that runs in the background, providing IDEs, editors, and other tools with information about Rust programs
  • Rust Regex Playground — Web tool to evaluate rust regular expressions
  • Rust Search Extensionstars580 — A handy browser extension to search crates and docs in address bar (omnibox).
  • artifactstars554 — the design doc tool made for developers
  • semantic-rsstars163 — automatic crate publishing
  • fwstars276 — workspace productivity booster
  • tinyrickstars38 a basic task dependency tool emphasizing Rust functions over raw shell commands.
  • scriptistostars161 A language-agnostic "shebang interpreter" that enables you to write one file scripts in compiled languages.

Build system

  • Cargo — the Rust package manager
    • cargo-benchcmp — A utility to compare Rust micro-benchmarks
    • cargo-bitbake — A cargo extension that can generate BitBake recipes utilizing the classes from meta-rust
    • cargo-cache — inspect/manage/clean your cargo cache (~/.cargo//${CARGO_HOME}), print sizes etc
    • cargo-check — A wrapper around cargo rustc -- -Zno-trans which can be helpful for running a faster compile if you only need correctness checks
    • cargo-count — lists source code counts and details about cargo projects, including unsafe statistics
    • cargo-deb — Generates binary Debian packages
    • cargo-deps — build dependency graphs of Rust projects
    • cargo-do — run multiple cargo commands in a row
    • cargo-ebuild — cargo extension that can generate ebuilds using the in-tree eclasses
    • cargo-edit — allows you to add and list dependencies by reading/writing to your Cargo.toml file from the command line
    • cargo-generatestars715 A generator of a rust project by leveraging a pre-existing git repository as a template.
    • cargo-get - Cargo plugin to easily query information from Cargo.toml files
    • cargo-graph — updated fork of cargo-dot with additional features. Unmaintained, see cargo-deps
    • cargo-info — queries crates.io for crates details from command line
    • cargo-license — A cargo subcommand to quickly view the licenses of all dependencies.
    • cargo-make — Rust task runner and build tool.
    • cargo-modules — A cargo plugin for showing a tree-like overview of a crate's modules.
    • cargo-multi — runs specified cargo command on multiple crates
    • cargo-outdated — displays when newer versions of Rust dependencies are available, or out of date
    • cargo-release — tool for releasing git-managed cargo project, build, tag, publish, doc and push
    • cargo-script — lets people quickly and easily run Rust "scripts" which can make use of Cargo's package ecosystem
    • cargo-testify — watches files changes, runs tests and notifies about the result with friendly OS notification
    • cargo-treestars538 – Cargo subcommand that visualizes a crate's dependency graph in a tree-like format
    • cargo-update — cargo subcommand for checking and applying updates to installed executables
    • cargo-watch — utility for cargo to compile projects when sources change
    • liuchong/cargo-xstars6 — A very simple third-party cargo subcommand to execute a custom command
    • dtolnay/cargo-expandstars955 — Expand macros in your source code
  • CMake
    • Devolutions/CMakeRuststars106 — useful for integrating a Rust library into a CMake project
    • SiegeLord/RustCMakestars94 — an example project showing usage of CMake with Rust
  • Github actions
    • icepuma/rust-actionstars54 — rust github action
    • peaceiris/actions-mdbookstars126 — GitHub Actions for mdBook
  • GitHub webhooks
    • snare — GitHub webhooks runner daemon
  • Webpack
    • mxseev/rust-loaderstars34 — Webpack Rust loader (wasm)

Debugging

  • GDB
    • rust-gdb
    • gdbguistars7.9k — Browser based frontend for gdb to debug C, C++, Rust, and go.
  • LLDB
    • lldb_batchmode.py — allows to use LLDB in a way similar to GDB's batch mode.
    • CodeLLDB — A LLDB extension for Visual Studio Code.

Deployment

  • Docker
    • emk/rust-musl-builderstars945 — Docker images for compiling static Rust binaries using musl-libc and musl-gcc, with static versions of useful C libraries
    • kpcyrd/mini-docker-ruststars101 — An example project for very small rust docker images
    • liuchong/docker-rustupstars60 — A multiple version (with musl tools) Rust Docker image
    • messense/rust-musl-crossstars162 — Docker images for compiling static Rust binaries using musl-cross
    • rust-lang-nursery/docker-ruststars224 — the official Rust Docker image
  • Github Pages
    • wasm-template-ruststars77 — A wasm template for Rust to publish to gh-pages without npm-deploy
  • Google App Engine
    • DenisKolodin/rust-app-enginestars45 — App Engine Rust boilerplate
  • Heroku
    • emk/heroku-buildpack-ruststars424 — A buildpack for Rust applications on Heroku

Embedded

Rust Embedded

  • Cross compiling
    • japaric/rust-crossstars1.8k — everything you need to know about cross compiling Rust programs
    • japaric/xargostars853 — effortless cross compilation of Rust programs to custom bare-metal targets like ARM Cortex-M
  • Raspberry Pi
    • Ogeon/rust-on-raspberry-pistars294 — instructions for how to cross compile Rust projects for the Raspberry Pi .
  • Arduino
    • avr-rust/ruduinostars445 ^`^t Reusable components for the Arduino Uno.

FFI

See also Foreign Function Interface, The Rust FFI Omnibus (a collection of examples of using code written in Rust from other languages) and FFI examples written in Ruststars847.

  • C
    • rlhunt/cbindgenstars1k — generates C header files from Rust source files. Used in Gecko for WebRender
    • Sean1708/rusty-cheddarstars189 — generates C header files from Rust source files
  • C++
    • rust-lang/rust-bindgenstars2.2k — A Rust bindings generator
    • dtolnay/cxxstars2.8k — Safe interop between Rust and C++
    • rust-cpp - Embed C++ code directly in Rust.
  • Erlang
    • rusterlium/rustlerstars2.8k — safe Rust bridge for creating Erlang NIF functions
  • Haskell
    • mgattozzi/curryrsstars258 — Bridge the gap between Haskell and Rust
    • mgattozzi/haskellrsstars20 — Rust in Haskell FFI Example
    • mgattozzi/rushsstars0 — Haskell in Rust FFI Example
  • Java
    • j4rs — use Java from Rust
    • bennettanderson/rjnistars59 — use Java from Rust
    • drrb/java-rust-examplestars285 — use Rust from Java
    • jni — use Rust from Java
    • jni-sys — Rust definitions corresponding to jni.h
    • rucaja — use Java from Rust
    • rawrafox/rust-jdbcstars13 — uses JDBC from Rust
  • Lua
    • jcmoyer/rust-lua53stars131 — Lua 5.3 bindings for Rust
    • lilyball/rust-luastars112 — Safe Rust bindings to Lua 5.1
    • tickbh/td_rluastars41 — Zero-cost high-level lua 5.3 wrapper for Rust
    • tomaka/hluastars447 — Rust library to interface with Lua
  • mruby
    • anima-engine/mrustystars192 — mruby safe bindings for Rust
  • Node.js
    • neon-bindings/neonstars5.4k — Rust bindings for writing safe and fast native Node.js modules
    • infinyon/node-bindgenstars162 - Easy way to generate nodejs module using Rust
  • Objective-C
    • SSheldon/rust-objcstars261 — Objective-C Runtime bindings and wrapper for Rust
  • Perl
    • vickenty/mi-ruststars1 — Adds support to M::I for building modules with Cargo
    • vickenty/perl-xsstars54 — Create Perl XS modules using Rust
  • Python
    • getsentry/milksnakestars689 — extension for python setuptools that allows you to distribute dynamic linked libraries in Python wheels in the most portable way imaginable.
    • dgrunwald/rust-cpythonstars1.4k — Python bindings
    • PyO3/PyO3stars4.2k — Rust bindings for the Python interpreter
  • Ruby
    • d-unseductable/rurustars775 — native Ruby extensions written in Rust
    • danielpclark/rutiestars484 — native Ruby extensions written in Rust and vice versa
    • tildeio/helixstars2k — write Ruby classes in Rust
  • Web Assembly
    • rustwasm/wasm-packstars3.4k — pack up the wasm and publish it to npm!
    • rustwasm/wasm-bindgenstars4.2k — A project for facilitating high-level interactions between wasm modules and JS.
    • rhysd/wainstars163 - wain: WebAssembly INterpreter from scratch in Safe Rust with zero dependency

IDEs

See also Are we (I)DE yet? and Rust Tools.

  • Atom
    • zargony/atom-language-ruststars117
    • rust-lang/atom-ide-ruststars204 — Rust IDE support for Atom, powered by the Rust Language Server (RLS)
  • Eclipse
    • Eclipse Corrosionstars156
    • RustDTstars351 —
  • Emacs
    • rust-modestars704 — Rust Major Mode
    • rusticstars377 - Rust development environment for Emacs
    • flycheck-ruststars105 — Rust support for Flycheckstars2.1k
    • emacs-racerstars390 — Autocompletion (see also company and auto-completestars1.6k)
  • gitpod.io — Online IDE with full Rust support based on Rust Language Server
  • gnome-builder native support for rust and cargo since Version 3.22.2
  • Kakoune
    • kak-lsp/kak-lspstars384 — LSP client. Implemented in Rust and supports rls out of the box.
  • NetBeans
    • drrb/rust-netbeansstars47
  • IntelliJ
    • intellij-rust/intellij-ruststars3.5k —
    • intellij-rust/intellij-tomlstars25 — basic Toml support
  • Ridestars163 —
  • SolidOakstars899 — A simple IDE for Rust, based on GTK+ and Neovimstars43.6k
  • Sublime Text
    • rust-lang/rust-enhancedstars614 — official Rust package
    • sublimehq/packages — native Sublime support (already installed)
  • Vim — the ubiquitous text editor
    • rust.vimstars2.6k — provides file detection, syntax highlighting, formatting, Syntastic integration, and more.
    • vim-cargostars40 — command bindings to quickly run cargo stuff from vim.
    • vim-racerstars616 — allows vim to use Racerstars3.3k for Rust code completion and navigation.
    • autozimu/LanguageClient-neovimstars3.2k — LSP client. Implemented in Rust and supports rls out of the box.
  • Visual Studio
    • PistonDevelopers/VisualRuststars688 — A Visual Studio extension for Rust
    • dgriffen/rls-vs2017stars106 — Rust support for Visual Studio 2017 Preview
  • Visual Studio Code
    • rust-lang/rls-vscode — Rust support for Visual Studio Code
    • rust-analyzer — An alternative rust language server to the RLS
    • CodeLLDB — A LLDB extension
    • cratesstars117 — crates is an extension for crates.io dependencies.

Pattern recognition

  • sfikas/rustevalstars16 — A tool used to evaluate the output of retrieval algorithms

Profiling

  • bheisler/criterion.rsstars1.8k — Statistics-driven benchmarking library for Rust
  • sharkdp/hyperfinestars7.6k — A command-line benchmarking tool
  • performancecopilot/hornetstars26 — A Performance Co-Pilot memory-mapped values instrumentation library
  • koute/memory-profilerstars2k — A memory profiler for Linux
  • ellisonch/rust-stopwatchstars64 — A stopwatch library
  • FlameGraphs
    • mrhooray/torchstars113 — generates FlameGraphs based on DWARF Debug Info
    • llogiq/flamestars541 —

Services

  • deps.rsstars255 — Detect outdated or insecure dependencies
  • docs.rs — Automatic documentation generation of crates

Static analysis

[assert, static]

  • facebookexperimental/MIRAIstars507 — an abstract interpreter operating on Rust's mid-level intermediate representation (MIR)
  • static_assertions — Compile-time assertions to ensure that invariants are met

Testing

[testing]

  • laboratory — A simple, expressive unit test framework for Rust
  • cucumber-rust — An implementation of the Cucumber testing framework for Rust.
  • demonstrate — Declarative Testing Framework
  • httpmockstars79 — HTTP mocking
  • mockiato — A strict, yet friendly mocking library for Rust 2018
  • mutagen — A source-level mutation testing framework (nightly only)
  • AlKass/polishstars41 — Mini Testing/Test-Driven Framework
  • proptest — property testing framework inspired by the Hypothesis framework for Python
  • quickcheck — A Rust implementation of QuickCheck
  • mockito — HTTP mocking
  • speculate — An RSpec inspired minimal testing framework for Rust
  • rstest — Fixture-based test framework for Rust
  • ruspec — Write like Rspec testing framework with rust
  • rust-fuzz/afl.rsstars1k — A Rust fuzzer, using AFL
  • tarpaulin — A code coverage tool designed for Rust
  • truststars1.1k — A Travis CI and AppVeyor template to test your Rust crate on 5 architectures and publish binary releases of it for Linux, macOS and Windows
  • fake-rsstars262 — A library for generating fake data
  • goldenfilestars7 - A library providing a simple API for goldenfile testing.
  • cargo-dinghy - A cargo extension to simplify running library tests and benches on smartphones and other small processor devices.

Transpiling

  • immunant/c2ruststars1.8k — C to Rust translator and cross checker built atop Clang/LLVM.
  • jameysharp/corrodestars2.1k — A C to Rust translator written in Haskell.

Libraries

  • Phate6660/nixinfostars12 [crate] — A lib crate for gathering system info such as cpu, distro, environment, kernel, etc.

Artificial Intelligence

Genetic algorithms

  • Martin1887/oxigenstars111 — Fast, parallel, extensible and adaptable genetic algorithm library. A example using this library solves the N Queens problem for N = 255 in only few seconds and using less than 1 MB of RAM.
  • innoave/genevostars57 — Execute genetic algorithm (GA) simulations in a customizable and extensible way.
  • willi-kappler/darwin-rsstars66 — Evolutionary algorithms with Rust
  • m-decoster/RsGeneticstars64 — Genetic Algorithm library in Rust. In maintenance mode.
  • mneumann/evo-rsstars5 — Evolutionary Algorithm Library for Rust. Without changes for 3 years.
  • yurytsoy/revonetstars14 — Rust implementation of real-coded GA for solving optimization problems and training of neural networks.
  • pkalivas/radiatestars71 — A customizable parallel genetic programming engine capable of evolving solutions for supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning problems. Comes with complete and customizable implementation of NEAT and Evtree.

Machine learning

[machine learning]

See also About Rust’s Machine Learning Community and Are we learning yet?.

  • rust-ml/linfastars929 — Machine learning framework.
  • AtheMathmo/rusty-machinestars1.2k — Machine learning library for Rust
  • avinashshenoy97/RusticSOMstars21 — Rust library for Self Organising Maps (SOM).
  • autumnai/leafstars5.5k — Open Machine Intelligence framework. . Abandoned project. The most updated fork is spearow/juicestars779.
  • tensorflow/ruststars3.1k — Rust language bindings for TensorFlow.
  • maciejkula/rustlearnstars486 — Machine learning crate for Rust.
  • LaurentMazare/tch-rsstars1k — Rust language bindings for PyTorch.
  • huggingface/tokenizersstars4.5k - Hugging Face's tokenizers for modern NLP pipelines written in Rust (original implementation) with bindings for Python.

Astronomy

[astronomy]

  • saurvs/astro-ruststars153 — astronomy for Rust
  • fitsio — fits interface library wrapping cfitsio
  • flosse/rust-sunstars25 — A rust port of the JS library suncalc

Asynchronous

  • zonyitoo/coio-rsstars439 — A coroutine I/O library with a working-stealing scheduler
  • dpc/miocostars125 — Scalable, coroutine-based, asynchronous IO handling library
  • TeaEntityLab/fpRuststars68 — Monad/MonadIO, Handler, Coroutine/doNotation, Functional Programming features for Rust
  • rust-lang/futures-rsstars3.8k — Zero-cost futures in Rust
  • miostars4.3k — MIO is a lightweight IO library for Rust with a focus on adding as little overhead as possible over the OS abstractions
  • Xudong-Huang/maystars915 — rust stackful coroutine library
  • rustasync/runtimestars881 — A runtime agnostic API designed to make async feel like its part of stdlib

Audio and Music

[audio]

  • GuillaumeGomez/rust-fmodstars45 — FMOD bindings
  • jhasse/earsstars75 — A simple library to play Sounds and Musics, on top of OpenAL and libsndfile
  • jpernst/altostars78 — OpenAL 1.1 bindings
  • musitdev/portmidi-rsstars62 — PortMidi bindings
  • hound — A WAV encoding and decoding library
  • RustAudio
    • RustAudio/cpalstars1.1k - Low-level cross-platform audio I/O library in pure Rust.
    • RustAudio/rodiostars690 — A Rust audio playback library
    • RustAudio/rust-portaudiostars283 — PortAudio bindings
  • ozankasikci/rust-music-theorystars417 — A Rust music theory library
  • MoAlyousef/soloud-rsstars23 — Rust bindings for the soloud audio engine library

Authentication

  • Keats/jsonwebtokenstars708 — JSON Web Token lib in rust
  • sgrust01/jwtvaultstars59 — Async library to manage and orchestrate JWT workflow
  • oauth2stars339 — Extensible, strongly-typed Rust OAuth2 client library
  • oxide-authstars294 — A OAuth2 server library, for use in combination with actix or other frontends, featuring a set of configurable and pluggable backends
  • yup-oauth2stars126 — An oauth2 client implementation providing the Device, Installed and Service Account flows

Automotive

  • canparse — A CAN signal and definition parser
  • j2534 — J2534 PassThru bindings
  • JulianSchmid/dlt_parsestars11 — Rust DLT (Diagnostic Log and Trace) packet parser
  • JulianSchmid/someip_parsestars8 [someip_parse] — A library for parsing the SOME/IP network protocol (without payload interpretation)
  • LibreTuner/tuneutilsstars4 [tuneutils] — Utilities for interfacing with, diagnosing, and tuning car
  • marcelbuesing/can-dbcstars16 [can-dbc] — A parser for the DBC format
  • marcelbuesing/tokio-socketcan-bcmstars1 [tokio-socketcan-bcm] — Linux SocketCAN BCM support for tokio
  • mbr/socketcanstars34 [socketcan] — Linux SocketCAN library
  • oefd/tokio-socketcanstars17 [tokio-socketcan]] — Linux SocketCAN support for tokio based on the socketcan crate
  • Sensirion/lin-busstars6 [lin-bus] — LIN bus driver traits and protocol implementation

Bioinformatics

  • nonnominandus/pdbtbxstars8 PDBTBX - PDB/mmCIF libary in Rust.
  • Rust-Bio — bioinformatics libraries in Rust.

Caching

  • mozilla/sccachestars2.1k - Shared Compilation Cache, great for Rust compilation
  • jaysonsantos/bmemcached-rsstars22 — Memcached library written in pure rust
  • jaemk/cachedstars564 — Simple function caching/memoization
  • aisk/rust-memcachestars62 — Memcached client library
  • hit-box/hitboxstars38 — Asynchronous caching framework supporting multiple backends

Concurrency

  • aymanmadkour/glockstars7 – Granular locking crate for Rust.
  • crossbeam-rs/crossbeamstars3.6k – Support for parallelism and low-level concurrency in Rust
  • orium/archerystars77 [archery] — Library to abstract from Rc/Arc pointer types.
  • pop-os/bus-writerstars25 — Generic single-reader, multi-writer
  • Rayonstars5.1k – A data parallelism library for Rust
  • rustcc/coroutine-rsstars372 – Coroutine Library in Rust
  • zonyitoo/coio-rsstars439 – Coroutine I/O for Rust

Cloud

  • AWS [aws]
    • rusoto/rusotostars2.3k —

Command-line

  • Argument parsing
    • clap-rsstars5.9k [clap] — A simple to use, full featured command-line argument parser
    • docopt/docopt.rsstars727 [docopt] — A Rust implementation of DocOpt
    • z5labs/pflagstars9 [pflag] — A port of @spf13's amazing POSIX compliant arg parsing library in Go.
    • TeXitoi/structoptstars2k [structopt] — parse command line argument by defining a struct
    • killercup/quiclistars487 [quicli] — quickly build cool CLI apps in Rust
    • ksk001100/seahorsestars138 [seahorse] — A minimal CLI framework written in Rust
  • Data visualization
    • nukesor/comfy-tablestars163 [comfy-table] — Beautiful dynamic tables for your cli tools.
    • reugn/rsparkstars30 [rspark] — ▁▂▆▇▁▄█▁ Sparklines for Rust apps
  • Human-centered design
    • rust-cli/human-panicstars784 [human-panic] — panic messages for humans
  • Line editor
    • srijs/rust-copperlinestars26 [copperline] — pure-Rust command line editing library
    • MovingtoMars/linerstars67 [liner] — A library offering readline-like functionality
    • murarth/linefeedstars155 [linefeed] — Configurable, extensible, interactive line reader
    • kkawakam/rustylinestars749 [rustyline] — readline implementation in Rust
  • Pipeline
    • imp/pager-rs [pager] — pipe your output through an external pager
    • hniksic/rust-subprocessstars276 [subprocess] — facilities for interaction with external pipelines
    • oconnor663/duct.rsstars417 [duct] — A builder for subprocess pipelines and IO redirection
    • philippkeller/rexpectstars113 [rexpect] — automate interactive applications such as ssh, ftp, passwd, etc
  • Progress
    • mitsuhiko/indicatifstars1.9k [indicatif] — indicate progress to users
    • a8m/pbstars409 [pbr] — console progress bar for Rust
    • FGRibreau/spinnersstars312 [spinners] — 60+ elegant terminal spinners
  • Prompt
    • hashmismatch/terminal_cli.rsstars37 [terminal_cli] — build an interactive command prompt
    • starship/starship [starship] — A minimal, blazing fast, and extremely customizable prompt for any shell
  • Style
    • ogham/rust-ansi-termstars332 [ansi_term] — control colours and formatting on ANSI terminals
    • LukasKalbertodt/term-painterstars67 [term-painter] — cross-platform styled terminal output
    • vitiral/termstylestars17 [termstyle] — build (and test) formatted and styled command line applications
    • SergioBenitez/yansistars89 [yansi] — A dead simple ANSI terminal color painting library
    • mackwic/coloredstars751 [colored] — Coloring terminal so simple, you already know how to do it!
  • TUI
    • TimonPost/crosstermstars1.1k [crossterm] — crossplatform terminal library
    • gyscos/Cursivestars2.2k [cursive] — build rich TUI applications
    • ogham/rust-term-gridstars50 [term_grid] — Rust library for putting things in a grid
    • redox-os/termionstars1.5k [termion] — bindless library for controlling terminals/TTY
    • fdehau/tui-rsstars4.9k [tui] — A TUI library inspired by blessed-contribstars14.2k and termuistars10.9k
    • BearLibTerminal

    • indigits/sciruststars223 — scientific computing library in Rust

Configuration

  • mehcode/config-rsstars968 [config] — Layered configuration system for Rust applications (with strong support for 12-factor applications).
  • theimpossibleastronaut/configsterstars17 [configster] — Rust library for parsing configuration files
  • Kixunil/configure_mestars35 [configure_me] — library for processing application configuration easily
  • andoriyu/ucliciousstars6 [uclicious] — libUCLstars1.3k based feature-rich configuration library.
  • FlashSystems/justconfigstars6 - Easily extendable, layered configuration library that introduces no additional dependencies into your project.
  • ANtlord/yasecstars1 [Yasec] - full featured boilerplace-free configuration from environment variables.

Cryptography

[crypto, cryptography]

  • briansmith/ringstars2.3k — Safe, fast, small crypto using Rust and BoringSSL's cryptography primitives.
  • briansmith/webpkistars319 — Web PKI TLS X.509 certificate validation in Rust.
  • orion-rs/orionstars249 — This library aims to provide easy and usable crypto. 'Usable' meaning exposing high-level API's that are easy to use and hard to misuse.
  • cossacklabs/themisstars1.3k [themis] — a high-level cryptographic library for solving typical data security tasks, best fit for multi-platform apps.
  • ctz/rustlsstars2.6k — A Rust implementation of TLS
  • DaGenix/rust-cryptostars1k — cryptographic algorithms in Rust
  • dalek-cryptography/curve25519-dalekstars489 — Pure Rust implementation of Curve25519 operations
  • dalek-cryptography/ed25519-dalekstars394 — Pure Rust implementation of Ed25519 digital signatures
  • dalek-cryptography/x25519-dalekstars186 — Pure Rust implementation of X25519 key exchange
  • debris/tiny-keccakstars135 — Pure Rust implementation of the Keccak family (SHA3)
  • defund/pwstars9 — CLI password manager with no frills
  • sodiumoxide/sodiumoxidestars610 — libsodiumstars9.2k bindings
  • doublify/libblockchainstars30 — A Blockchain implementation
  • exonum/exonumstars1.1k [exonum] — extensible framework for blockchain projects
  • klutzy/surugastars120 — A Rust implementation of TLS 1.2
  • libOctavo/octavostars132 — Modular hash and crypto library in Rust
  • novifinancial/opaque-kestars55 — Pure Rust implementation of the recent OPAQUE password-authenticated key exchange.
  • RustCrypto/hashesstars686 — Collection of cryptographic hash functions written in pure Rust
  • rustindia/mpw-rsstars32 — Pure Rust implementation of the Master Password password manager
  • Fraunhofer-AISEC/rabestars39 — Library providing several Attribute-Based Encryption (ABE) schemes
  • racum/rust-djangohashersstars44 — A Rust port of the password primitives used in the Django Project. It doesn't require Django, only hashes and validates passwords according to its style.
  • RNCryptor/rncryptor-rsstars5 — Pure Rust implementation of the RNCryptor AES file format
  • conradkleinespel/roosterstars107 [rooster] — Simple password manager to use in your terminal
  • sfackler/rust-native-tlsstars278 — Bindings for native TLS libraries
  • sfackler/rust-opensslstars773 — OpenSSL bindings
  • kornelski/rust-security-frameworkstars109 — Bindings for Security Framework (OSX native)
  • steffengy/schannel-rsstars25 — Bindings for Schannel (Windows native TLS)
  • zebradil/rustotponystars15 — CLI manager of one-time password generators aka Google Authenticator (TOTP)

    • tikv/grpc-rsstars1.3k — The gRPC library for Rust built on C Core library and futures
  • IPNetwork
    • achanda/ipnetworkstars67 — A library to work with IP networks in pure Rust
    • candrew/netsimstars81 — A Rust library for network simulation and testing
  • JSON-RPC
    • vlopes11/futures-jsonrpcstars14 [futures-jsonrpc] — Futures implementation for JSON-RPC
  • Low level
    • libpnet/libpnetstars1.4k — A cross-platform, low level networking
    • smoltcp-rs/smoltcpstars1.9k — A standalone, event-driven TCP/IP stack that is designed for bare-metal, real-time systems
    • tokio-rs/tokiostars11.9k — A network application framework for rapid development and highly scalable production deployments of clients and servers.
    • dylanmckay/protocolstars105 — Custom TCP/UDP protocol definitions
    • actix/actixstars6.3k — Actor library for Rust
  • NanoMsg
    • thehydroimpulse/nanomsg.rsstars351 — nanomsg bindings
  • Nng
    • neachdainn/nng-rs [Nng] — Nng (nanomsg v2) bindings
  • NNTP
    • mattnenterprise/rust-nntpstars12 — an NNTP client for Rust
  • POP3
    • mattnenterprise/rust-pop3stars18 — A POP3 client for Rust
  • SSH
    • alexcrichton/ssh2-rsstars245 — libssh2 bindings
    • Thrusshstars16 — an SSH library written from scratch in Rust, backed by libsodium
  • Stomp
    • zslayton/stomp-rsstars75 — A STOMP 1.2 client implementation in Rust
    • adwhit/tokio-stompstars6 — An async STOMP v1.1 client for Rust, using the Tokio stack.
  • uTP
    • meqif/rust-utpstars118 — A uTP (Micro Transport Protocol) library for Rust.
  • ZeroMQ
    • erickt/rust-zmqstars567 — ZeroMQ bindings
  • CoAP
    • Covertness/coap-rsstars130 — A Constrained Application Protocol(CoAP) library for Rust.
  • Docker
    • fussybeaver/bollardstars200 — Docker daemon API in Rust
  • RPC
    • smallnest/rpcx-rsstars58 — A RPC library for Rust for developing microservices in easy and simple way.
  • QUIC
    • cloudflare/quichestars4.6k — cloudflare implementation of the QUIC transport protocol and HTTP/3
    • quinn-rs/quinnstars1.6k — Futures-based QUIC implementation in Rust
    • mozilla/neqostars1.1k — an Implementation of QUIC written in Rust
  • P2P
    • libp2p/rust-libp2pstars1.7k — The Rust Implementation of libp2p networking stack.
  • NATS
    • nats-io/nats.rsstars304 — Rust client for NATS, the cloud native messaging system.

Parsing

  • aleshaleksey/libazdicestars1 — A parser for parsing dice strings for TTRPGs and TTRPG development
  • Folyd/robotstxtstars60 - A native Rust port of Google's robots.txt parser and matcher C++ library
  • Geal/nomstars5.2k — parser combinator library
  • ivanceras/inquereststars25 — an URL parameter parser for rest filter inquiry
  • kevinmehall/rust-pegstars880 — Parsing Expression Grammar (PEG) parser generator
  • m4rw3r/chompstars204 – A fast monadic-style parser combinator
  • Marwes/combinestars912 — parser combinator library
  • lalrpop/lalrpopstars1.7k — LR(1) parser generator for Rust
  • nrc/zerostars40 — zero-allocation parsing of binary data
  • pest-parser/peststars2.3k — The Elegant Parser
  • ptal/oakstars130 — A typed PEG parser generator (compiler plugin)
  • replicadse/wavefront_rsstars1 — A parser for the Wavefront OBJ format.
  • s-panferov/queryststars54 — A query string parsing library for Rust inspired by https://github.com/ljharb/qsstars6.2k
  • freestrings/jsonpathstars53 — JsonPath engine written in Rust. Webassembly and Javascript support too

Packaging formats

  • pop-os/debarchivestars8 Library for reading and extracting debian archives

Peripherals

  • Serial Port
    • Susurrus/serialport-rsstars118 [serialport] — A cross-platform library that provides access to a serial port

Platform specific

  • Cross-platform

    • svartalf/rust-battery — Cross-platform information about the notebook batteries

  • Linux

    • frol/cgroups-fsstars22 — Rust bindings to Linux Control Groups (cgroups)
    • pop-os/dbus-udisks2stars9 — UDisks2 DBus API
    • pop-os/distinststars154 — Linux distribution installer library
    • hannobraun/inotify-rsstars182 — inotify bindings
    • arvancloud/nginx-rsstars77 — Nginx bindings
    • yaa110/rust-iptablesstars43 — iptables bindings

  • Unix-like

    • nix-rust/nixstars1.5k — Unix-like API bindings
    • zargony/fuse-rsstars749 — FUSEstars3.2k bindings

  • Windows

    • retep998/winapi-rsstars1.3k — Windows API bindings

  • FreeBSD

    • fubarnetes/libjail-rsstars29 — Rust implementation of a FreeBSD jail library
    • dlrobertson/capsicum-rsstars13 — Rust bindings for the FreeBSD capsicum framework

Scripting

[scripting]

  • duckscript — Simple, extendable and embeddable scripting language.stars186
  • PistonDevelopers/dyonstars1.3k — A rusty dynamically typed scripting language
  • gluon-lang/gluonstars2.3k — A small, statically-typed, functional programming language
  • murarth/ketosstars627 — A Lisp dialect functional programming language serving as a scripting and extension language for rust
  • moss — A dynamically typed scripting language
  • munstars1.1k — A compiled, statically-typed scripting language with first class hot reloading support
  • rhaiscript/rhaistars1k — A tiny and fast embedded scripting language resembling a combination of JS and Rust
  • ippan/cloverstars11 [clover] - A scripting language created in Rust

Simulation

[simulation]

  • bigbang - Gravitational and collisional n-body simulation with optional GPU acceleration
  • nyx-space - High fidelity, fast, reliable and validated astrodynamical toolkit library, used for spacecraft mission design and orbit determination

Task scheduling

  • BinChengZhao/delay-timerstars88 — delay-timer is a task manager based on a time wheel algorithm, which makes it easy to manage timed tasks, or to periodically execute arbitrary tasks such as closures. [](

https://crates.io/crates/delay_timer)

Template engine

  • Handlebars
    • sunng87/handlebars-ruststars652 — Handlebars template engine with inheritance, custom helper support.
    • botika/yartestars193 — Yarte stands for Yet Another Rust Template Engine, is the fastest template engine.
  • HTML
    • lambda-fairy/maudstars997 — compile-time HTML templates
    • Stebalien/horrorshow-rsstars229 — compile-time HTML templates
    • kaj/ructestars212 — HTML template system for Rust
    • Keats/terastars1.6k — template engine based on Jinja2 and the Django template language.
    • djc/askamastars1.3k — template rendering engine based on Jinja
    • naomijub/hiccupstars10 — template engine inpired by Clojure's Hiccup.
  • Mustache
    • rustache/rustachestars204 —
  • tailhook/marafetstars11 — Compiler for Jade-like template language to cito.js-based virtual dom

Text processing

  • BurntSushi/suffixstars159 — Linear time suffix array construction (with Unicode support)
  • BurntSushi/tabwriterstars181 — Elastic tab stops (i.e., text column alignment)
  • mgeisler/textwrapstars167 [textwrap] — Word wrap text (with support for hyphenation)
  • pwoolcoc/ngramsstars26 — Construct n-grams from arbitrary iterators
  • ps1dr3x/easy_readerstars66 — A reader that allows forwards, backwards and random navigations through the lines of huge files without consuming iterators
  • rust-lang/regexstars1.9k — Regular expressions (RE2 style)
  • strsim-rs — String similarity metrics
  • greyblake/whatlang-rsstars572 — Natural language detection library based on trigrams
  • yaa110/rake-rsstars18 — Multilingual implementation of RAKE algorithm for Rust
  • Lucretiel/joinerystars63 [joinery] – Generic string + iterable joining
  • Daniel-Liu-c0deb0t/triple_accelstars36 [triple_accel] - Rust edit distance routines accelerated using SIMD; supports fast Hamming, Levenshtein, restricted Damerau-Levenshtein, etc. distance calculations and string search

Text search

  • andylokandy/simsearch-rsstars84 [simsearch] — A simple and lightweight fuzzy search engine that works in memory, searching for similar strings
  • BurntSushi/fststars1.1k [fst] —
  • meilisearch/MeiliSearchstars13.9k — Ultra relevant, instant and typo-tolerant full-text search API.
  • minio/minsqlstars355 — High-performance log search engine.
  • CurrySoftware/perlinstars64 [perlin]
  • tantivy-search/tantivystars4.8k [tantivy] —

Unsafe

  • zerocopy — Utilities for safely reinterpreting arbitrary byte sequences as native Rust types

Virtualization

  • beneills/quantumstars173 — Advanced Rust quantum computer simulator
  • chromium/chromiumos/platform/crosvm CrOSVM — Enables Chrome OS to run Linux apps inside a fast, secure virtualized environment
  • unicorn-rs/unicorn-rsstars115 — Rust bindings for the unicorn CPU emulator
  • saurvs/hypervisor-rsstars48 — Hardware-accelerated virtualization on OS X

Web programming

See also Are we web yet? and Rust web framework comparisonstars2.5k.

  • Client-side / WASM
    • cargo-web — A Cargo subcommand for the client-side Web
    • seed — A Rust framework for creating web apps
    • stdweb — A standard library for the client-side Web
    • yew — Rust framework for making client web apps
    • sauronstars1.2k - Client side web framework which closely adheres to The Elm Architecture.
  • HTTP Client
    • alexcrichton/curl-ruststars707 — libcurl bindings
    • async-graphqlstars1.5k - A GraphQL server library implemented in Rust
    • graphql-clientstars642 — Typed, correct GraphQL requests and responses in Rust.
    • hyperium/hyperstars7.9k — an HTTP implementation
    • seanmonstar/reqweststars4k — an ergonomic HTTP Client for Rust.
    • DoumanAsh/yukikaze — Beautiful and elegant Yukikaze is little HTTP client library based on hyper.
  • HTTP Server
    • actix/actix-webstars11.2k — A lightweight async web framework for Rust with websocket support
    • branca — A Pure Rust implementation of Branca for Authenticated and Encrypted API tokens.
    • Gothamstars1.8k — A flexible web framework that does not sacrifice safety, security or speed.
    • hyperium/hyperstars7.9k — an HTTP implementation
    • GildedHonour/frank_jwtstars227 — JSON Web Token implementation in Rust.
    • handlebars-ruststars652 — an Iron web framework middleware.
    • Ironstars5.9k — A middleware-based server framework
    • Juniperstars3.7k — GraphQL server library for Rust
    • Nickelstars2.8k — inspired by Express
    • Ogeon/rustfulstars868 — A RESTful web framework for Rust
    • Rocketstars13.4k — Rocket is web framework for Rust (nightly) with a focus on ease-of-use, expressability, and speed
    • Rustlessstars604 — A REST-like API micro-framework inspired by Grapestars9.3k and Hyperstars7.9k
    • Saphirstars75 — A progressive web framework with low-level control, without the pain.
    • daogangtang/sapperstars616 — A lightweight web framework built on async hyper, implemented in Rust language.
    • tiny-httpstars511 — Low level HTTP server library
    • tomaka/rouillestars639 — Web framework in Rust
    • carllerche/tower-webstars953 [tower-web] — A fast, boilerplate free, web framework for Rust
    • danclive/sincerestars93 — A micro web framework for Rust(stable) based on hyper and multithreading.
    • oltdaniel/zapstars53 — A lightning fast http framework for Rust
  • WebSocket
    • actix/sockjsstars63 — A SockJS server for Rust
    • rust-websocketstars924 — A framework for dealing with WebSocket connections (both clients and servers)
    • housleyjk/ws-rsstars1.2k — lightweight, event-driven WebSockets for Rust
    • snapview/tungstenite-rsstars657 — Lightweight stream-based WebSocket implementation for Rust.
    • vi/websocatstars2.8k — CLI for interacting with WebSockets, with functionality of Netcat, Curl and Socat.
    • vityafx/urlshortener-rsstars28 [urlshortener] — A very simple urlshortener library for Rust.
    • bitwyre/websocket_corestars9 — Websocket generic server library for periodic message broadcast.
  • Miscellaneous
    • cargonautsstars175 — A web framework intended for building maintainable, well-factored web apps.
    • osohq/osostars1.1k [oso] - A policy engine for authorization that's embedded in your application.
    • pyros2097/rust-embedstars587 — A macro to embed static assets into the rust binary
    • utkarshkukreti/select.rsstars674 [select] — A library to extract useful data from HTML documents, suitable for web scraping.
    • pwoolcoc/soup [soup] — A library similar to Python's BeautifulSoup, designed to enable quick and easy manipulation and querying of HTML documents.
    • softprops/openapistars85 — A library for processing openapi spec files
    • tbot - Make cool Telegram bots with Rust easily
    • teloxide/teloxidestars673 - An elegant Telegram bots framework for Rust
  • Reverse Proxy
    • sozu-proxy/sozustars1.4k [sozu] — A HTTP reverse proxy.
  • Static Site Generators
    • getzola/zolastars6.8k [zola] — An opinionated static site generator with everything built-in.
    • cobalt-org/cobalt.rsstars957 — Static site generator written in Rust
    • FuGangqiang/mdblog.rsstars35 — Static site generator from markdown files.
    • leven-the-blog/levenstars49 [leven] — A simple, parallelized blog generator.

Registries

A registry allows you to publish your Rust libraries as crate packages, to share them with others publicly and privately.

  • Crates — The official public registry for Rust/Cargo.
  • Cloudsmith — A fully managed package management SaaS, with first-class support for public and private Cargo/Rust registries (plus many others). Has a generous free-tier and is also completely free for open-source.

Resources

  • Benchmarks
    • TeXitoi/benchmarksgame-rsstars62 — Rust implementations for the The Computer Language Benchmarks Game
  • Decks & Presentations
    • Learning systems programming with Rust — Presented by Julia Evans @ Rustconf 2016.
    • Shipping a Solid Rust Crate — Presented by Michael Gattozzi @ RustConf 2017
    • Rust: Hack Without Fear! — Presented by Nicholas Matsakis @ C++Now 2018
  • Learning
    • Easy Ruststars6k - Learn Rust in easy English.
    • Rust Gymstars137 - A big collection of coding interview problems solved in Rust.
    • Programming Community Curated Resources for Learning Rust — A list of recommended resources voted by the programming community.
    • awesome-rust-mentors — A list of helpful Rust mentors willing to take mentees and eductate them about Rust and programming.
    • Awesome Rust Streamingstars439 - A community curated list of livestreams about Rust.
    • exercism.io — programming exercises that help you learn new concepts in Rust.
    • Idiomatic Ruststars2.5k — A peer-reviewed collection of articles/talks/repos which teach idiomatic Rust.
    • Learning Rust With Entirely Too Many Linked Lists — in-depth exploration of Rust's memory management rules, through implementing a few different types of list structures.
    • Rust by Example
    • Rust Cookbook — A collection of simple examples that demonstrate good practices to accomplish common programming tasks, using the crates of the Rust ecosystem.
    • Rust Online Courses at Classpert — A list of Rust online courses (paid) from Classpert Online Course Search
    • Rust for professionals — A quick introduction to Rust for experienced software developers.
    • Rust in Motion — A video series by Carol Nichols and Jake Goulding (paid)
    • rust-learningstars6.6k — A collection of useful resources to learn Rust
    • Rustlingsstars16.4k — small exercises to get you used to reading and writing Rust code
    • stdxstars1.4k — Learn these crates first as an extension to std
    • University of Pennsylvania's Comp Sci Rust Programming Course
    • Build a language VM
    • Code Playground - Interactively edit & play rust snippets on your iPhone and iPad devices.
    • Refactoring to Rust - A book that introduces to Rust language.
  • Podcasts
    • New Rustacean — A podcast about learning Rust
    • Rustacean Station — A community project for creating podcast content for Rust
  • RustCamp 2015 Talks
  • Rust Design Patternsstars4.9k
  • Rust Guidelines
  • RustBooksstars1.3k — list of RustBooks
  • Rust Subreddit — A subreddit(forum) where rust related questions, articles and resources are posted and discussed
  • Rust Servers, Services and Apps - MEAP - Build backend servers, services, and front-ends in Rust to get fast, reliable, and maintainable applications.
